acceptance.assertion: captain-run requires a structured execution_intent for mutating actions before executor invocation.
The intent record binds action, target digest, expected_head, expected_base, evidence hashes, actor/context and timestamp without exposing secrets.
Missing, malformed or drifted intent blocks execution before any high-impact command is invoked.
Tests cover missing intent, mismatched intent, valid intent and no-secret leakage in receipts.

goal: Add an explicit execution_intent record for captain-run so high-impact execution is bound to a reviewed intent before any executor is invoked.

metadata.reason: PR #102 introduced captain-run pr-merge execution; execution intent was intentionally deferred.
metadata.source: Grabowski captain-run PR #104/#106 reviews and follow-up triage

validated_acceptance.fail-closed: Missing, malformed, non-canonical, stale, future-dated or drifting intent blocks with no executor calls.
validated_acceptance.intent-bound: Intent binds action, canonical target_sha256, expected_head, expected_base, six decisive evidence digests including authorization_sha256, actor/context digests and a timezone-aware issued_at.
validated_acceptance.intent-required: captain-run computes and validates execution_intent before any GitHub merge or runtime deployment executor call.
validated_acceptance.tests: Focused suite: 10 passed and 41 subtests; full make validate: 1503 tests and all validation gates passed.

validation.ci: GitHub validate (3.10) and validate (3.12) PASS for PR #194.
validation.external_review: Claude Opus packet-bound review PASS, finding_count=0, review_sha256=2ebad3fce9abe559f77a8bca727d1f0603902a8e3ff377a039e6ab37b6d26516.
non_claims: Intent binding does not establish semantic correctness of an authorized action.
No new high-impact action or authority was added.
External review supplements but does not replace deterministic tests and CI.
validation.runtime_deploy: Grabowski runtime healthy and integrity-valid at merge commit 2a4e332ac8cfbdbaa93a766fcff98a6e4e7a6d24; release 2a4e332ac8cf-srcset9e28f46b5e8d-locke6664d600b6c-contract9dc5637bd19f.

metadata.verification_note: Captain-run requires a fresh structured execution_intent before any executor and binds action, target, head, base, decisive evidence and the complete authorization mode.

title: Add Captain execution intent records
